name: World Check Casher
description_short: ACE Cash Express operates a check-cashing storefront in Charlotte, NC offering check cashing, money transfers, bill payment, and prepaid banking products without requiring a bank account.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is a financial services retailer operating a physical location at 2107 Beatties Ford Rd in Charlotte, North Carolina. The company has been providing alternative financial services to consumers who lack traditional bank accounts or need faster access to funds than banks typically provide. ACE Cash Express offers a full suite of money services and banking alternatives designed for underbanked consumers.

The Charlotte location provides check cashing (no bank account required, only valid government-issued ID), MoneyGram money transfers to over 200 countries, bill payment services, money orders, ATM access, and tax refund cashing. They also offer banking products including the Porte mobile banking account, Flare Account online banking, and ACE Elite Visa prepaid debit cards, all serviced through Pathward National Association. Business check cashing is available for owners and officers with proper documentation.

ACE distinguishes itself through extended service hours (open until 7 PM weekdays, 5 PM Saturdays), willingness to cash large business check amounts, and integration of mobile banking with in-person support at physical locations. The company positions itself as more accessible than traditional banks, with no account requirement for basic services and same-location access to multiple financial products.

The company operates as a check-cashing and alternative financial services retailer rather than a bank or lender. Consumers should note that while specific fee structures are not disclosed on the website, check-cashing services typically carry transaction fees. The company's reliance on prepaid card products suggests targeting of unbanked/underbanked populations, though transparent pricing information would be necessary to fully evaluate cost-effectiveness compared to traditional banking.
pros: No bank account required for check cashing—only valid government-issued ID needed
Extended hours (10 AM–7 PM weekdays, Saturdays until 5 PM) beyond typical bank hours
MoneyGram money transfers available to over 200 countries and territories
Willingness to cash large business check amounts with extended hours vs. traditional banks
Integrated mobile banking (Porte app) with in-person support at the same location
Multiple money services under one roof: check cashing, bill pay, money orders, ATM, tax refunds
Business check cashing available with proper documentation (owner verification, business registration)
cons: Specific fee structure for check cashing not disclosed on website—consumers cannot compare costs upfront
Limited to single Charlotte location; not a chain with broad accessibility
Prepaid card and banking products issued through third-party bank (Pathward N.A.) rather than direct ACE services
No information provided about check cashing limits, rejected check types, or ID requirements beyond 'government-issued'
Marketing focus on prepaid cards and alternative banking suggests targeting of underbanked consumers who may face higher overall costs
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers in Charlotte needing immediate check cashing without account requirements
Small business owners needing to cash business checks outside traditional bank hours
International money transfer needs to over 200 countries via MoneyGram
Consumers seeking mobile banking integration with local in-person financial service access
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express Charlotte is best for unbanked consumers and small business owners in the Charlotte area who need quick check cashing without bank accounts and extended service hours. The main caveat is that check-cashing fees are not transparently disclosed on the website, and the company's heavy promotion of prepaid cards suggests overall costs may be higher than traditional banking—consumers should request specific fee quotes before using services.
services: Check cashing (most types, no bank account required)
MoneyGram money transfers (domestic and international to 200+ countries)
Bill payment (rent, utilities, credit cards—in-store and online)
Tax refund check cashing and tax card cash withdrawals
Porte mobile banking account with in-person support
ACE Elite Visa prepaid debit card
Card fund loading and cash withdrawal services
